name: Color Snake Run
description: Dive into the vibrant world of Color Snake Run 3D Game, an exciting and addictive arcade experience where speed, focus, and color matching skills are the key to survival. Control your colorful snake as it slithers through dynamic tracks filled with challenging obstacles, glowing paths, and thrilling twists. In this fast-paced runner game, your mission is simple but challenging: guide your snake through obstacles by matching the correct colors.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
